title: Meet the Head of Juan Pérez
original_title: Conozca la cabeza de Juan Pérez
overview: Juan Perez is a wizard who begins to remember how he lost his head, after an economic  crisis in the Circus where he works, he promises to mount a spectacular act of beheading that it could again return it to its glory years.  But without any fifth in the bag and with time running out to build a machine is forced to rob a real guillotine without this weighs a terrible curse.
